codeReview.summary: Pass. Re-reviewing fix commit `10a1fda` shows the prior blocker is resolved: `fingerprint_path()` now hashes symlink entries and their targets, and `copy_directory_contents()` restores symlinks as symlinks, so symlink-only workspace drift now triggers restore and restores preserve the link structure. `LocalSandboxSession::cleanup()` also removes persisted `snapshot_root` for caller-owned sessions, while the existing memory-note flow in `LocalSandboxSessionState` still keeps notes resumable within the same sandbox session and absent from unrelated fresh sessions.

summary: Reviewed the mission metadata, prior failure report and synthesis, worker handoff and transcript skeleton for session `d181ec45-b64e-44bd-95e2-5e29b8a507b9`, the `rust-sandbox-worker` skill, current HEAD, and the `10a1fda` diff. Result: pass. The symlink snapshot gap called out in the prior review is fixed in `crates/agents-core/src/sandbox/mod.rs`, the new regressions at `crates/openai-agents/tests/sandbox_semantics.rs:1593` and `:1788` cover symlink-only drift restore and caller-owned snapshot cleanup, and I found no new blocking issues within this feature's scope.
